description: Preference recall: user states coding language preference; eval checks if assistant can recall it later.

turns.content: Just so you know, I strongly prefer TypeScript over JavaScript for all my projects.
Noted! TypeScript's type safety is a big advantage.
Yes, I find it catches so many bugs before runtime.
Absolutely. I'll keep that in mind for any code suggestions.

eval_question: What programming language does this user prefer?
